## Summary

<!-- One-line description of what this PR does. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this change needed?  What problem does it solve? -->

## Implementation Approach

<!-- Brief explanation of key technical decisions and trade-offs. -->

## Testing

<!-- How was this change tested?  Include commands, test results, or manual verification steps. -->

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] Manual verification (describe below)

## Risk Assessment

<!-- What could go wrong?  Are there rollback considerations or backward-compatibility concerns? -->

- Risk level: <!-- Low / Medium / High -->
- Rollback plan: <!-- How to revert if needed -->
- Breaking change: <!-- Yes / No -->

## Screenshots (if applicable)

<!-- For frontend changes, include before/after screenshots. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] PR description is complete
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Coverage meets threshold (≥80%)
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
